issues.description: KO action appears twice as separate array elements. Should be consolidated into a single KO action with maxCount:2 to represent 'up to 2' characters. Current DSL forces exactly 2 KOs; effect text allows 0-2.

Condition type 'HasRestingDon' with count:1 is incorrect. The effect text 'DON!! −1' indicates a cost/resource requirement (returning 1 DON!! to deck), not a conditional check. This should use 'HasAttachedDon' with count:1, or the DSL format may require a different condition structure for optional costs.
